blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: drizzle, highs of 43°F, winds around 24 mph.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F, winds around 25 mph. Expect variable conditions.
